title:
SCS/SB 927 - This act prohibits the preparation, distribution, advertisement, sale, or offering for sale of a kratom product that:  (1) is adulterated; (2) is sold to a person under 21 years of age; (3) contains 7-hydroxymitragynine concentrated at a level above eight hundred parts per million on a dry-weight basis; (4) mimics candy or is appealing to children; or (5) is combustible or intended for vaporization.  Kratom products shall contain specified labels that include disclaimers.  A person who violates this provision will be deemed to have engaged in an unlawful practice in violation of the state's Merchandising Practices Act.

	Additionally, it shall be an infraction for a person to sell a kratom product to a person under 21 years of age, as described in the act.
SARAH HASKINS
